data.short_description: Salty Bagel and Grill is opening its sixth location in Melbourne, FL, owned by Bernard and Elizabeth Corrigan. The concept offers fresh, in-house bagels with 24 flavors daily, hot and cold sandwiches, and a growing coffee program. The Melbourne location will have approximately 15 indoor seats plus potential outdoor seating.

data.event_date: Approximately 3–4 weeks from article date (exact date not specified)
data.status: Soft opening expected in approximately three to four weeks
data.short_description: Pho 5 Spices is a new Vietnamese restaurant from Tobey and Jenny Vu, currently completing interior renovations. The full-service restaurant will seat approximately 45–56 guests and serve traditional Vietnamese dishes including pho, noodle bowls, and rice plates. It will be open seven days a week for lunch and dinner.

data.event_date: Approximately 1 month from article date (exact date not specified)
data.status: Targeting an opening in about a month
data.short_description: Casa Cotzelli is a casual, family-oriented Italian restaurant and the second location from owners Filippo Butelli and Gabriele Cozza. The space will seat approximately 120–125 guests and feature an open kitchen, homemade pasta, and made-from-scratch sauces. The menu includes signature items like eggplant parmesan, paccheri with pistachio pesto, and Fiorentina steak.

Big Jake's BBQ is a fast-casual barbecue spot with a drive-thru and limited indoor seating, led by Robert Rukab and partner Zee. The menu focuses on pit-cooked chicken and ribs with classic sides. Hours are planned daily from 10 a.m.–10 p.m.

data.status: Targeting a June opening (second local location)
data.short_description: Potbelly Sandwich Works is a Chicago-born sandwich chain targeting a June opening as a second local Jacksonville location. The franchise is operated by Patrick and Leah Pendergast, who plan multiple locations across Northeast Florida. The menu includes toasted subs, milkshakes, soups, and fresh-baked cookies.

data.event_date: Late spring to early summer (exact date not specified)
data.status: Targeting a late spring to early summer opening
data.short_description: Kappuccinos is a dual-concept space operating as a breakfast café by day and sports bar by night, led by Keith and Catherine Jones. The menu includes breakfast staples and later offerings like burgers, cheesesteaks, and wings. Hours are planned Tuesday–Sunday.

data.store_name: Dunc's Bar and Grill featuring Southern Yankee Queen
data.location: 196 Miracle Strip Pkwy SE Unit H, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32548
data.event_date: First week of May (year not specified)
data.short_description: Dunc's Bar and Grill is a neighborhood bar featuring Southern comfort food led by Beatrice Stjulien of Southern Yankee Queen. The menu includes po'boys, wings, oxtails, meatloaf, and Creole-inspired dishes, with indoor and outdoor seating and a full bar. The restaurant was previously targeting an April opening but is now aiming for the first week of May pending final approvals.

data.store_name: Jimmy John's and Buffalo Wild Wings Go
data.short_description: This dual-concept location combines Jimmy John's and Buffalo Wild Wings Go under one roof in a fast-casual, quick-service format, owned by Kent Ramos. The space will include indoor seating for 20–24 guests, a drive-thru for Jimmy John's, and patio seating. Approximately 80 percent of the traditional Buffalo Wild Wings menu will be available in a streamlined format.

Ay Que Rico! is preparing to open its second location in Lakeland, blending traditional and fine Cuban cuisine in a full-service, family-oriented setting. The restaurant will seat approximately 126–135 guests with two outdoor areas, including a backyard event space with a stage for up to 350–400 guests. Signature items include the Cuban sandwich, palomillo steak dishes, ropa vieja, and oxtail.

data.status: Targeting an April 11 reopening following its remodel
data.short_description: 45 Sports Bar & Lounge is reopening after a multi-month remodel and operational reset, following approximately four to five months of closure for renovations. The updated space seats approximately 123 guests and focuses on Puerto Rican cuisine including tripleta sandwiches and mofongo. Owner Roberto Anglada invested in new equipment, a refreshed space, and a revised menu for the relaunch.

data.event_date: Late spring to early summer (exact date not specified)
data.status: Targeting a late spring to early summer opening
data.short_description: Shaka Taco is opening a new standalone location near UNCW in Wilmington, NC, with construction currently underway including kitchen expansion. The quick-service restaurant will feature limited indoor seating and a larger covered outdoor porch, open seven days a week for lunch and dinner. The menu centers on tacos, burritos, and bowls with fresh seafood and house-made sauces.

data.event_date: Soft opening April 14; grand opening April 15 (year not specified)
data.status: Soft opening planned for April 14 and a grand opening on April 15
data.short_description: Alessi Bakery is relocating one block from its longtime location and expanding into an 18,000-square-foot multi-faceted food destination. The new space includes a bakery, deli, catering operation, food market, full liquor bar, Woodstone oven pizza, and rotisserie program. The 100-plus-year-old family business will offer more than 120 seats across indoor and outdoor areas with open-air kitchens.

data.store_name: Zaza Cuban Comfort Food (Zaza Bar and Cuban Cafe)
data.short_description: Zaza Cuban Comfort Food is opening a second airport location at Orlando International Airport on the A-side near Southwest gates 90–120. The approximately 1,500-square-foot concept will operate as Zaza Bar and Cuban Cafe, offering fresh-made Cuban sandwiches, empanadas, pastries, and a full bar program. It expands the brand's MCO footprint, which already includes a location on the B-side.

data.event_date: June–July (year not specified); first or second week of July targeted
data.short_description: Tampa Joe's is relocating after a 16-year run at its previous location to the Hub of Lexington Oaks in Wesley Chapel. The American Italian sports bar will span approximately 5,000 square feet with seating for about 300 guests, a 20-by-7-foot video wall above the bar, and additional TVs throughout. The menu includes pizzas, pastas, ribs, salmon, burgers, and wings.

data.status: Targeting a Wednesday, April 15 opening, pending final state approvals
data.short_description: Wingnutz is opening its fourth active location and first in Florida, bringing its Buffalo, NY chicken wing concept to the Lakeland market. The location features 60 covered patio seats, beer and wine service, four TVs, and plans for live music. The menu focuses on fresh, never-frozen wings with 13 flavors alongside sandwiches, smash burgers, and sides.

data.status: Targeting a grand opening on April 29th
data.short_description: The Wine Bar is a boutique upscale wine concept from family team Michael and Stacy Surapine and Bailey Surapine-Meen, featuring approximately 178 wines sourced globally with a focus on organic and sustainably produced selections. The space includes varied seating styles, a glass-enclosed tasting room, and self-serve wine dispensers offering multiple pour sizes. A food program with charcuterie, Mediterranean-style offerings, and Sunday brunch is also planned.

data.location: 3333 South Orange Avenue, Suite 105, Orlando, FL 32806
data.short_description: Sabai Thai Street Food is a casual full-service Thai restaurant with a 32-seat dining room, led by Billy Spradlin and family chefs Viradee and Alex Pisara. The menu includes Tom Yum noodle soup, handmade Thai sausage, and multi-generational family recipes. Hours are Monday–Thursday 11 a.m.–9 p.m. and Friday–Saturday 11 a.m.–10 p.m.

Unplugged Social Cafe is a counter-service café by day and lounge by night, operated by Brooke and Juan Guevara, with approximately 150 indoor seats plus patio. The menu includes a breakfast croissant sandwich, citrus grove salad, Caprese chicken panini, organic coffee, and evening charcuterie. Hours are Monday–Saturday 8 a.m.–4 p.m. (café) and Thursday–Saturday 7 p.m.–10 p.m. (lounge).

data.location: 501 North Orlando Ave. Ste. 317, Winter Park, FL 32789
data.short_description: La Diperie is a dessert concept focused on dipped soft serve with extensive customization options, led by the Robert and Erica Vanderloop family. The menu includes soft serve with 18 chocolate dips, donuts, cookie sandwiches, cheesecake, and vegan options. Hours are planned Monday–Thursday 1 p.m.–10 p.m. and Friday–Saturday 1 p.m.–11 p.m. or midnight.

data.location: 2565 Ocoee Apopka Rd., Suite A, Apopka, FL 32703
data.short_description: Takami Sushi is a full-service Japanese restaurant with a sushi bar, patio, and seating for 120+ guests, targeting an early April opening in Apopka. The menu includes sushi and sashimi. Additional details were not provided in the article excerpt.

data.event_date: Early May (grand opening; year not specified)
data.status: Soft opening this week; grand opening targeted for early May
data.short_description: Unhinged Coffee & Co. is a day-to-night café shifting from morning coffee into an evening social space, built around inclusivity and community, led by Jonny Mocha and Cody Alexander Vaughn. Morning hours are 6:30 a.m.–3:30 p.m. (soft opening), expanding after launch. Evening programming will include beer, wine, and THC beverages.

data.event_date: Mid-July to early August (year not specified)
data.status: Targeting mid-July to early August opening
data.short_description: Grain & Berry is a superfood café focused on healthy, accessible options including açaí bowls, smoothies, juices, and nutrient-forward items. The concept is led by Sudarshan Krishnamurthi. Additional details were not provided in the article.

data.location: 811 S Main Street, Suite 206, Unit 811-106, Rolesville, NC 27571

data.status: Targeting late spring to early summer opening
data.short_description: The Pub Hub is a beer garden-style pub with indoor/outdoor seating, live music, and games, led by Dan Colby and Liza David. Food will be provided via nearby partners. The beverage menu includes craft beer, wine, and frozen drinks.

data.location: 1318 S Main St Unit 108, Wake Forest, NC 27587
data.short_description: Shine & Dine Cafe is a full-service American restaurant with a Southern influence, led by Mina Luka and Wael Feloboss. The menu includes breakfast, lunch, and dinner classics. Hours are planned Tuesday–Saturday 6 a.m.–9 p.m. and Sunday 6 a.m.–3 p.m.
Reserve is described as an upscale Indian concept targeting an early April opening in Cary. Additional details were not provided in the article excerpt.

data.store_name: Cheez'd and Confuzed & Empire Steak South
data.location: 2960 Ball Ground/Canton Hwy, Ball Ground, GA 30107
data.short_description: Cheez'd and Confuzed is opening in a stationary location after years of mobile service and adding a new brand, Empire Steak South, to their lineup. The article references a full article for further details. No opening date or status phrasing was specified in the roundup text.

data.location: 2110 Powers Ferry Rd Suite 120, Atlanta, GA 30339
data.short_description: Big Fat Vegan is a vegan concept from mother-daughter team Tanetta Ellzey and Iyonna Poags, marking the brand's first permanent location after operating as a food truck and pop-up for two to three years. The opening is scheduled for April 4. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

data.event_date: Late May to early June (year not specified)
data.status: Targeting a late May to early June opening
data.short_description: Pataaka is a new modern Indian restaurant from Anish Nair, designed as an upscale dining destination with warm lighting, contemporary design, and a refined atmosphere. The space supports both everyday dining and special occasions. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

SKOL Brewing Company is a Nordic-themed brewpub led by Gray Lane and Drew Tull that has operated since 2025 and is expanding its Downtown Atlanta footprint with a large-scale addition opening in May. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

data.short_description: The Energy Station is preparing to open in Hampton, GA, with owner Samuel Bustamante targeting a soft opening in the coming weeks followed by a grand opening. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

The Tickled Pickle Deli is a fast-casual deli taking over a former Smoothie King location with a drive-thru, led by Sarah and Barrett Dabbs. The menu focuses on hot and cold sandwiches including roast beef, corned beef, and specialty named subs, plus salads and high-protein options. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

data.location: 42 Union St S Suite B, Concord, NC 28025

data.short_description: An unnamed Caribbean fusion restaurant with lounge atmosphere, indoor seating, and patio is planned by Jeanneth Vasquez and Demonde Richardson. The menu will draw from Jamaican, Puerto Rican, and Honduran influences with a full bar. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

The menu includes waffles, pancakes, chicken and waffles, sandwiches, burgers, and classic comfort food. Daily hours are planned from 7 a.m.–3 p.m.
El Palacio Restaurant is a Latin restaurant planned for Concord, NC, led by Isidra Barron Meza. No opening date or hours have been announced. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

The Tickled Pickle Deli is opening in the former Smoothie King location, owned by Sarah and Barrett Dabbs, who also own Johnny Roger's BBQ & Burgers in the same shopping plaza. The full article contains further details.

data.short_description: BB's Mocksville is a new restaurant and live music venue from musicians Buddy Black and John Forbes, targeting an opening in approximately four to six weeks. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

The business is about 85% ready and working through final inspections. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

data.short_description: Crisp Kitchen & Cocktails, led by Matt Marenna, has reopened at a new space in Brevard Courtyard after relocating from its previous home inside Latta Arcade. Lunch service began on March 5. Additional details are in the full article referenced.

data.location: 7808 Rea Rd Suite E, Charlotte, NC 28277

data.status: About 85% ready and working through final inspections before opening
data.short_description: The Jugo Bar is opening its first street-level retail location, having previously operated from the same address in a production and wholesale capacity for several years. The roughly 3,000-square-foot space will offer made-to-order juices, smoothies, smoothie bowls, algae-based offerings, and rooibos teas, along with two meeting rooms. Owner William Fulton has over 153 flavor profiles and plans to rotate weekly.

data.short_description: Music- and performance-themed coffee shop with events like poetry slams and open mic nights. Owned by Malvina McNeill.
Casual taqueria focused on authentic Mexican street tacos with dine-in, takeout, and delivery. Owned by Brayan Romero.
Family-run Peruvian restaurant with full-service format and from-scratch cooking. Owned by Mayra Chipoco and family.

data.short_description: SKOL Brewing Company is adding a ~30,000 sq ft gaming lounge called Valhalla Gaming Lounge to its existing Downtown Atlanta brewpub. The expansion will include 40+ gaming options, live music space, private events, and a new commercial kitchen.

data.short_description: Nutrition shop offering healthy shakes, energy refreshers, fruit bowls, waffles, and donuts. This will be the third location for the business group, owned by Samuel Bustamante.
Deli opening in a former Smoothie King space with drive-thru, offering hot and cold sandwiches, soups, and salads. Owned by Sarah and Barrett Dabbs, who also own Johnny Roger's BBQ & Burgers.

data.location: 20601 Torrence Chapel Rd Suite 106, Cornelius, NC 28031
data.short_description: Third location of the donut brand, taking over former Sweet Cakes Bakery space, with ~1,400 sq ft focused on specialty square donuts and a coffee program. Owned by Dustin and Colleen Wanemacher.

data.short_description: Modern upscale Indian restaurant with ~113 seats, mezzanine private dining, and a 14-seat bar. Owned by Anish Nair, who also operates Jai Ho, Aroma Indian Kitchen, Ole Cuban Kitchen, and Melt Kitchen.

A 50-seat Japanese restaurant with sushi counter, private dining, and patio seating, featuring seafood sourced from Japan. Owned by Álvaro Perez Miranda.
Expanded Jamaican fusion restaurant with ~70 seats offering counter-service with dine-in and catering. Menu includes oxtail, jerk chicken, honey garlic salmon, pasta variations, and lunch specials.

The brand's 10th corporate location, featuring a 3,300 sq ft layout with ~60 seats, open kitchen, and thin-crust pizzas made with imported Italian flour. Co-founded by Umberto Mascagni and Chef Renato Viola.

Bakery-cafe with fresh-milled wheat and on-site bread baking, offering counter service with ~45 indoor seats and patio seating. Franchised by Rishy and Quint Studer, located on the lower level of their apartment building.
